projects.title: Class XI Project
projects.details: Project that uses most of the concepts that have been learnt (8 marks)

projects.title: Class XII Class Project
projects.details: Create something tangible and useful using Python file handling/Python-SQL connectivity. Work in groups of two to three students, started at least 6 months before submission. Aim: find a real-world problem (e.g., GST invoice creation for local businesses). Use creative solutions like games or school software.

practicals.title: Lab Test - Python Program
practicals.details: Python program (60% logic + 20% documentation + 20% code quality) for Class XI

practicals.title: Lab Test - Python Program & SQL Queries
practicals.details: Python program (60% logic + 20% documentation + 20% code quality) AND SQL queries (4 queries based on one or two tables)

practicals.title: Report File - Class XII Python Programs
Report File - SQL Queries
practicals.details: SQL queries – Minimum 5 sets using one table / two tables

practicals.title: Report File - Python-SQL Connectivity Programs
practicals.details: Minimum 4 programs based on Python–SQL connectivity
